loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing THD compliance averages — per-order harmonics (H5, H7), flicker, and crest factor are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing V-THD and I-THD trends — harmonic order (5th/7th) and scalar stats are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Displacement PF and Phase Angle — K-factor is not measured for this asset; K-Stress tab uses Displacement PF as a proxy for transformer stress.
